name: Impeccable
summary: Bring Impeccable into NextClaw with bundled frontend design references, critique and polish workflows, and optional detector-guided anti-pattern scanning.

summaryI18n.en: Bring Impeccable into NextClaw with bundled frontend design references, critique and polish workflows, and optional detector-guided anti-pattern scanning.
summaryI18n.zh: 把 Impeccable 接入 NextClaw：内置前端设计参考、批判式评审与 polish 工作流，并支持可选的 detector 反模式扫描。

description: Use this skill when the user wants distinctive, production-grade frontend design inside NextClaw. It adapts the upstream Impeccable project into a marketplace-ready package with bundled references for typography, color, layout, motion, interaction, responsive design, UX writing, guided workflows for shaping, crafting, critique, audit, polish, and optional readiness-gated use of the upstream impeccable detector CLI.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants distinctive, production-grade frontend design inside NextClaw. It adapts the upstream Impeccable project into a marketplace-ready package with bundled references for typography, color, layout, motion, interaction, responsive design, UX writing, guided workflows for shaping, crafting, critique, audit, polish, and optional readiness-gated use of the upstream impeccable detector CLI.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望在 NextClaw 内获得更有辨识度、可交付的高质量前端设计指导时使用此技能。它将上游 Impeccable 项目适配成可上架的 marketplace 包：内置 typography、color、layout、motion、interaction、responsive、UX writing 等参考资料，提供 shaping、craft、critique、audit、polish 等工作流，并在环境就绪时支持可选的 upstream impeccable detector CLI。

author: NextClaw (adapted from Paul Bakaus)
